focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
【金融新闻】多家基金机构同日公告 传递长期看好A股市场信心
【中国新闻】南非6月通胀升至5.0% 创近两年新高
【世界新闻】Even camels can't cope: Africa's ships of the desert hit by rising temperatures

items.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
items.summary: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of a poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.

items.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
items.summary: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.

items.title: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable
items.summary: The episode has also intensified a broader debate in Washington over the influx of Chinese open models.

items.title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
items.summary: OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is w

items.title: Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z
items.summary: Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.

items.title: 多家基金机构同日公告 传递长期看好A股市场信心
items.summary: 真金白银！多家基金机构同日公告

items.title: 稳定、制度、信心 证监会系列座谈会释放三大信号
items.summary: 证监会系列座谈会，三大信号！

items.title: AI算力需求爆发：高端PCB供不应求，价格涨超300%
items.summary: 价格涨超300%！高端PCB需求爆发，订单排到2027年

items.title: 站上产业链风口，国产高端电子布加快扩产
items.summary: AI算力需求带动电子布年内5轮提价，部分产品排产周期超4个月

items.title: 三大指标再创新高！中国造船业持续领跑全球
items.summary: 7月23日，工业和信息化部发布2026年上半年我国船舶工业统计数据。数据显示：我国造船完工量、新接订单量和手持订单量三大核心指标再创历史新高，持续领跑全球市场。

items.title: 南非6月通胀升至5.0% 创近两年新高
items.summary: 中新社约翰内斯堡7月22日电 (记者 孙翔)南非统计局22日公布的数据显示，南非6月消费者价格指数(CPI)同比上涨5.0%，高于5月的4.5%，创2024年6月(5.1%)以来最高水平。

items.title: 英国投入7.08亿英镑加速下一代空战技术研发
items.summary: 中新社伦敦7月22日电 (记者 欧阳开宇)英国政府22日公布，将投入7.08亿英镑专项资金，提速本国新一代空中作战技术研发，推进六代战机相关项目建设，带动本土军工产业就业发展。

items.title: 法国6月下旬热浪期间超额死亡人数达5700余例
items.summary: 中新社巴黎7月22日电 (记者 李洋)法国公共卫生署当地时间22日发布6月下旬法国热浪期间死亡情况的进一步评估报告，透露6月17日至7月2日热浪期间的超额死亡人数达5700余例。

items.title: 欧盟航空安全局预警航空公司避开约旦空域
items.summary: 中新社布鲁塞尔7月22日电 (记者 德永健)随着伊朗持续打击约旦境内美军目标，欧盟航空安全局22日发出预警，建议即日起航空公司避开约旦空域。

items.title: 泰国总理：以更大的诚意欢迎中国投资者
items.summary: 中新社曼谷7月22日电 (记者 李映民)泰国总理阿努廷22日在2026泰中合作博览会开幕式上致辞称，泰国政府将以更大的诚意欢迎中国投资者，为中国企业的落户创设更好的投资环境。

items.title: Even camels can't cope: Africa's ships of the desert hit by rising temperatures
items.summary: Herders and experts tell the BBC how Africa's camels are suffering because of extreme heat.

items.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
items.summary: The US Department of Energy says the "peaceful" co-operation agreement will give US firms "great access" to the Saudi nuclear energy programme.

items.title: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
items.summary: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.

items.title: Watch: What we know about the US-Saudi nuclear deal
items.summary: The BBC's Sarah Smith explains the implications of the landmark cooperation agreement between both countries.

items.title: Trump threatens to target Iran's bridges and power plants if Hormuz attacks persist
items.summary: Donald Trump says the US will respond any time Iranian forces shoot at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: lopopolo/harness-engineering（⭐ 2187）
items.summary: 🐎 Ryan Lopopolo’s anthology, field guide, and agent context bundle for harness engineering

items.summary: Your clothes, extracted and organized with gpt-image.

items.summary: yoink any video from your terminal. no shady ads.

items.title: nethical6/conversation-steganography（⭐ 979）
items.summary: Use LLMs to hide messages inside normal looking conversations
